data.title: Prices are unlikely to fall despite the Supreme Court striking down Trump's tariffs, Goldman Sachs says
data.description: Tariffs have already added roughly 0.7% to core inflation through January.
data.content:
Don't expect prices at the store to fall just because the Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump's tariffs.

data.title: Alarmed Indian officials race to tame world-beating options boom
data.description: Jane Street, Citadel Securities, Jump Trading and Optiver have all beefed up local operations in recent years alongside a bevy of hedge funds, attracted in part by the nation’s options market
